name: Shared ValueEmbedding (tok_emb reuse, layers 5-10) + Legal TTT
blurb: Reuses tied tok_emb for ValueEmbedding instead of training a separate table, with learned projection + per-layer scales expanded to layers 5-10. Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Parameter Banking + Legal TTT). 3-seed mean: 1.1201 (std 0.0002). Pre-TTT mean: 1.1223.
author: mradassaad
